metadata.credit: Pick order and tier list reconstructed from 17lands data and Draftsim methodology
metadata.author: Draftsim
metadata.rating_system_note: Tier ratings calculated using 17lands Premier Draft win rates (ever drawn) following Draftsim's methodology.

tier_key.S: Near-game-winning cards. Take over almost any other card in the pack. First-pick regardless of colors.
tier_key.A: Strong reason to be in its color. First-pick quality.
tier_key.B: Powerful playable. Highly desirable. Will often pull you into these colors.
tier_key.C: Solid role-player. Easy inclusion in any deck of its colors.
tier_key.D: Acceptable filler. Plays a role in specific decks, but you're not excited to play it.
tier_key.F: Unplayable or near-unplayable. Avoid unless you have no other options.
